sentences.arabic: شَعَرَتْ نُورٌ بِأَلَمٍ فِي مَعِدَتِهَا بَعْدَ الْغَدَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Nur je osjetila bol u stomaku nakon ručka.
sentences.translationEn: Nour felt stomach pain after lunch.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ تَأْكُلْ كَثِيرًا فِي الْعَشَاءِ وَشَرِبَتِ الشَّايَ.
sentences.translation: Nije puno jela za večeru i popila je čaj.
sentences.translationEn: She did not eat much at dinner and drank tea.

sentences.arabic: فِي الصَّبَاحِ ذَهَبَتْ إِلَى الطَّبِيبِ لِتَعْرِفَ السَّبَبَ.
sentences.translation: Ujutro je otišla kod ljekara da sazna razlog.
sentences.translationEn: In the morning she went to the doctor to find the reason.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لَهَا الطَّبِيبُ أَلَّا تَأْكُلَ الطَّعَامَ الدَّسِمَ.
sentences.translation: Ljekar joj je rekao da ne jede masnu hranu.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor told her not to eat fatty food.

sentences.arabic: اتَّبَعَتْ نُورٌ نَصِيحَةَ الطَّبِيبِ وَشَعَرَتْ بِتَحَسُّنٍ.
sentences.translation: Nur je slijedila savjet ljekara i osjetila poboljšanje.
sentences.translationEn: Nour followed the doctor's advice and felt better.
